name: Montego Bags O' Wags Dog Treats – Chicken Sticks 500g
shortDescription: Delight your dog with the savory taste of  Bags O’ Wags Chewies Chicken Sticks Dog Treats . These flavorful chicken sticks are perfect for rewarding your furry friend during training, as a snack between meals, or simply as a way to show your love. Not suitable for puppies.
description: Montego BAGS O’ WAGS Chicken Bars  are deliciously chewy treats made with high-quality ingredients, perfect for adult dogs who deserve something extra special. Whether used as a daily reward, training treat, or a between-meal snack, these bars are sure to satisfy. Formulated for  maximum taste and nutrition , Chicken Bars help support your dog’s energy and vitality. Ideal for reinforcing good behaviour, boosting training sessions, or simply sharing a joyful moment. Key Benefits Highly palatable:  Dogs love the rich beef aroma and chewy texture. Nutritious:  Provides quality protein and energy for active pets. Training aid:  Perfect for positive reinforcement and good behaviour. Daily snack:  A tasty, wholesome treat without overfeeding. Ingredients Corn starch, chicken meal, water, glycerine, propylene glycol, sugars, wheat gluten, spray-‎dried animal plasma, poultry fat, sodium phosphates, fish oil.‎ ADDITIVES (/kg):  SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers with chicken aroma, caramel colourant; PRESERVATIVES:  Potassium sorbate. Free from:  artificial sugars, soy, eggs, dairy, and meat-based fillers. Nutritional Information Nutrient Amount Crude Protein 20% Total Fat 5% Crude Fibre 1% Moisture 18.5% Calcium 1% Phosphorus 0.8% Sugars 3% Metabolizable Energy 330 kcal/100 g These treats are intended as a snack and not a complete diet. Always provide fresh water.
